versions.version_description: This version is a little more accurate and included the orchestra intro.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: When You Say Nothing At All
Two Less Lonely People In The World

content:
"She's Out Of My Life" (Capo: 2nd. fret / ^ = play in arpeggio)

[Orchestra Intro]

^[ch]Aadd9[/ch]  [ch]A5[/ch]  [ch]Dadd9[/ch]  [ch]Aadd9[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]Gadd9[/ch]  [ch]F6[/ch] 
*[ch]Dadd9[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]*  (*-* 2 times)

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bdim[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Fdim[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]A/G[/ch]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
 And I don't know whether to laugh or cry[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em/D[/ch]          [ch]C#m7-5[/ch]     [ch]F#7-9[/ch]  [ch]F#7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I don't know whether to live___or___die[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 And it cuts like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Em7/A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G6[/ch]
 She's out of my life [/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 It's out of my hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bdim[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Fdim[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 It's out of my hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A/G[/ch]      [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 To think for two years she was here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Em/D[/ch]           [ch]C#m7-5[/ch]      [ch]F#7-9[/ch]  [ch]F#7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]
 And I took her for granted, I was so____cavalier[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 Now, the way that it stands[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Em7/A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 It's out of my hands [/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]F/C[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]D/A[/ch]
 So I've learned that love's not possession[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/C[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
 And I've learned that love won't wait[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C/E[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch]/[ch]E[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]/[ch]D[/ch]
 Now I've learned that love needs expression[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
 But I've learned too late [/tab]

[Verse 3]

[tab]          [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 And she's out____of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bdim[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Fdim[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A/G[/ch]   [ch]F#m7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Damned indecision and cursed pride[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em/D[/ch]     [ch]C#m7-5[/ch]            [ch]F#7-9[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
 Kept my love for her locked deep inside[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 And it cuts like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Em7/A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]A/G[/ch]  [ch]Dadd9[/ch]
 She's out of my life[/tab]
